## Deep Audit V2: hx-toggle-button

**Comprehensive enterprise-grade quality audit** of the `hx-toggle-button` component. NOTE: This is one of 9 incomplete components (no index.ts) from the PR 175 rescue batch.

1. **Design Tokens** — All colors, spacing, typography use `--hx-*` tokens. No hardcoded values.
